title: Historical Closeout Baseline
summary: Baseline older lower-trust closeout references that predate the current package-use and closeout-distillation follow-through. These remain historical audit context, not current external-work state.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Reopen declarative portability so stable lifecycle and runtime truth stops depending on large Python-owned implementations
issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.
